Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

If you change the books we will not distribute them!!!

Social · asked by user [] · 2008-06-17 · 1 answers
With the current hot topic, I was thinking what if we say that we will not distribute changed or annotated books?
I guess that could make them think about it.
user [154] · 2008-06-17
[quote][cite] abhiram:[/cite]With the current hot topic, I was thinking what if we say that we will not distribute changed or annotated books?
I guess that could make them think about it.[/quote] I think BBT will be delighted, as it means they do not have to supply Bhagavatams to you. You will only sell Gitas and small books that makes commercial sense.(and let other s sell Bhags).
